summary: Backend refactoring verification complete - All API endpoints working after server.py was split into modular routers. 26/27 pytest tests passed (96%). Frontend UI verification: Login, Projects, Estimator, Dashboard, Master Data screens, User Management, Audit Logs, Cashflow all working correctly.

minor.issue: Health endpoint at root level returns HTML (caught by frontend via ingress routing). Not a refactoring issue - expected K8s ingress behavior.

issues: Console warning about chart width/height - recharts library issue, does not affect functionality (known issue from iteration 28-29)
Console warning about <tr> being child of <span> - HTML structure warning for table rendering, does not affect functionality

5. Dashboard analytics load - PASS (Total Projects: 24, Total Value: $7.2M)

16. Audit Logs page - PASS (137 total logs, 100 last 7 days)

backend_api_tests.summary: All refactored router endpoints working correctly

critical_code_review_comments: Backend refactoring successful - server.py reduced from 3403 lines to 76 lines
All 8 routers properly integrated: auth_routes, users, masters, projects, financials, dashboard, notifications, files
API prefix /api correctly applied to all routes via main api_router
Frontend code unchanged - no integration issues
All CRUD operations for master data verified working
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend was refactored from single 3403-line server.py into modular routers structure. All endpoints verified working under /api prefix. Routers: auth_routes.py (register, login, me), users.py (CRUD, settings, approvers), masters.py (customers, technologies, skills, proficiency_rates, base_locations, project_types, sales_managers), projects.py (CRUD, versions, clone, templates, approval workflow), financials.py (milestones, cashflow), dashboard.py (analytics, compare), notifications.py (notifications, audit_logs), files.py (gantt, downloads). Previous tests from iteration 29 still relevant for frontend features like collapsible sections and Smart Import.

router_structure_verified.server.py: 76 lines - main app, CORS, startup/shutdown, includes all routers
router_structure_verified.routers/users.py: user CRUD, settings, approvers list, password reset
router_structure_verified.routers/masters.py: all master data CRUD (customers, technologies, skills, etc.)
router_structure_verified.routers/projects.py: project CRUD, versions, clone, templates, approval workflow
